name: StepZen
description: The StepZen CLI is the primary way to build, deploy and test your schemas on StepZen

args.name: command
args.description: Command name for which to display help

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Deploy, watch and develop your API

options.name: --dir
options.description: The working directory for StepZen assets

options.name: --port
options.description: The port number to use for the GraphiQL explorer

subcommands.name: import
subcommands.description: Import pre-configured schemas to Your API

args.name: name
args.description: The name of the generator to import

options.name: --dir
options.description: The directory to which the schema will be imported

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List the assets of a specified type that are linked to the StepZen account

args.name: type
args.description: The type of asset to list (schemas or configurationsets)
